Field.Name: Title
Field.Description: The subject line from the email that was sent.
The date when the email was sent.
Field.Name: DateSent
Field.Title: DateSent

Field.Description: E-mail addresses or UniqNames of the recipients of this email, separated by commas or one per line.
Field.Name: EmailRecipients
Field.Title: Email Recipients

Field.Description: The person who sent the email.
Field.Name: Sender
Field.Title: Sender

Field.Description: The team with ownership of this email communication.
Field.Name: Team

Field.Description: The program associated with this email.
Field.Name: Program
Field.Title: Program

Field.Description: Copy of the email that was sent.
Field.Name: Message

Field.Description: Email recipients (linked to People list).
Field.Name: EmailRecipientsPeople

Field.Description: A narrative of the outcome of this email.
Field.Name: Notes
Field.Title: Results and Outcomes

Field.Description: The total number of recipients, excluding duplicates (such as when emails are sent to both a preferred and primary email).
Field.Name: TotalRecipients

Field.Description: The number of recipients who are already in the People list, meaning there has been some kind of engagement prior to sending this email.
Field.Name: PeopleCount
NewPeopleCount
Field.Description: The number of recipients who were added to the People list.
The email open rate, as reported by the app used to send or track the emails.
Field.Name: EmailOpenRate

Field.Description: The email click rate, as reported by the app used to send or track the emails.
Field.Name: EmailClickRate
TaxKeyword
Field.Description: Custom tags and keywords for searching.

Field.Name: EmailRecipientsPeople_x003a_Uniq
Field.Description: Email recipients, linked to People list (UniqName).

Field.Name: EmailRecipientsPeople_x003a__hid
Field.Description: School affiliations for the email recipients that are linked to the People list.
If checked, TrackMaster will copy these tags to the People list record for each email recipient. The tag sync process can take a few hours, and it will uncheck this box once complete.
Field.Name: TagsSync

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last version that was modified automatically. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysVersion

Field.Description: System field used by automations to keep track of the last workflow that modified this item. This helps prevent infinite loops.
Field.Name: _SysFlow

Field.Description: If this email was sent to a group, enter the group here, so the recipients can be extracted from that group. The group must already be configured in the Groups List.
Field.Name: GroupRecipients
GroupRecipients_x003a_MCommunity
Field.Description: List of MCommunity groups to whom the email was sent. Auto-populated based on the Recipient Groups field.
The display name used to refer back to this email from other lists. Auto-calculated.
Field.Name: EmailDisplayName
